t: Record hub-assigned dev port block [4020-4029] and set primary port 4020

_behavior_directive.what_this_is: A work item to TRACK and implement — record this spoke's hub-assigned port block in local config and update dev server startup
_behavior_directive.what_this_is_NOT: An instruction to execute automatically on receipt. Add to task tracker and implement in the next working session.

context: The hub now maintains a coordinated port namespace. Every active spoke has a reserved 10-port block so concurrent dev sessions never collide. This spoke (tracks) owns: ports 4020-4029, primary port 4020, local hostname 'tracks.local'. Source of truth: hub-registry.json at /home/mario/projects/wheelwright/hub/hub-registry.json, field wheels[].dev for wheel_id='tracks'. Group 'wheelwright' range: {'root':3000-3999,'wheelwright':4000-4999,'client-work':5000-5999}[group]. Windows hosts file maps tracks.local → 127.0.0.1 so the project is reachable at http://tracks.local/ when dev server is running.
perceive: Find the entry with wheel_id='tracks' and read the 'dev' field
Check whether WAI-Spoke/dev-config.json already exists in this project
Check package.json (if present) — does the 'dev' script already specify this port?
Check .env.local / .env (if present) — is PORT already set?
execute:
Create or overwrite WAI-Spoke/dev-config.json with the following content:
  {"port_block":[4020, 4029],"primary_port":4020,"hostname":"tracks.local","folder_group":"wheelwright","source":"hub-registry.json","assigned_at":"2026-05-13"}
In package.json 'dev' script, set the server port to 4020
If .env.local exists and doesn't already have PORT: add PORT=4020 to it
Do NOT use any port outside 4020-4029 for this project's dev server
verify: Running the dev server starts on port 4020 with no binding error
(If hosts file synced) http://tracks.local/ loads the running dev server
